news.paragraph: AMD is seeing positive momentum driven by its expanding role in enterprise AI infrastructure and safety-certified AI edge growth. While recent blowout Q1 earnings have fueled optimism and led BofA to raise its price target to $500, Daiwa Securities recently downgraded the stock from Buy to Outperform. Traders should weigh these growth prospects against the recent shift in analyst sentiment.
headlines: AMD Green Hills Alliance Targets Safety Certified AI Edge Growth Potential
How AMD (AMD) Is Expanding Its Role in Enterprise AI Infrastructure
Does AMD Still Have Room to Climb After Blowout Q1 Earnings?
BofA Raises Price Target on Advanced Micro Devices to $500 From $450, Keeps Buy Rating
Market Analysis: Advanced Micro Devices And Competitors In Semiconductors & Semiconductor Equipment Industry
Daiwa Securities Downgrades Advanced Micro Devices to Outperform From Buy, Price Target is $500
